title: Cherry-Pit
content:
Julia and I did lately sit,
playing for sport at cherry-pit;
She threw; I cast; and, having thrown
I got the pit, she got the stone.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Cherry-Pit"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
